Dear [Candidate First Name],

POSITION:—
EMPLOYMENT TYPE:—
LOCATION:—
REPORTING TO:—

SALARY:—

Always-On Pipeline
Every candidate in your database automatically receives relevant job alerts, market insights, and check-ins. The system tells you who is heating up, who clicked your job, and who to call right now.

Delete All Workspace Data

Database Connection
Connect to Supabase to sync data across devices and users. Without a connection, TalentBase works perfectly вЂ” data is saved locally in your browser. All changes mirror to localStorage instantly, so Supabase is enhancement-only.
Not connected
Enter your Supabase project URL and anon key below
Supabase Project URL
Found in Supabase в†’ Settings в†’ API
Anon / Public Key
Public key вЂ” safe to use in browser
User Authentication
Sign in with your Supabase account to enable multi-user sync and row-level security.
Email
Password
Signed in
Supabase Table Setup
Run this SQL in your Supabase SQL editor to create the required tables with row-level security:
-- в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
-- TalentBase вЂ” Supabase Schema + RLS
-- Run BOTH blocks in Supabase Dashboard в†’ SQL Editor в†’ Run
-- Run schema first, then RLS block.
-- в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

-- в”Ђв”Ђ BLOCK 1: TABLES + INDEXES в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS candidates (
  id                text PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id           uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users ON DELETE CASCADE,
  data              jsonb,
  visible_to_client boolean DEFAULT false,
  client_company    text,
  created_at        timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS jobs (
  id         text PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id    uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users ON DELETE CASCADE,
  data       jsonb,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deals (
  id         text PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id    uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users ON DELETE CASCADE,
  data       jsonb,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS activity (
  id           uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  candidate_id text,
  user_id      uuid REFERENCES auth.users ON DELETE CASCADE,
  text         text,
  tracking_id  text,
  email        text,
  created_at   timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS client_feedback (
  id             uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  candidate_id   text NOT NULL,
  client_user_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users ON DELETE CASCADE,
  decision       text,
  note           text,
  created_at     timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS candidates_user_created ON candidates(user_id, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS jobs_user_created       ON jobs(user_id, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS deals_user_created      ON deals(user_id, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS activity_candidate      ON activity(candidate_id, created_at DESC);

ALTER TABLE candidates      ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE jobs            ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE deals           ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE activity        ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE client_feedback ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

-- в”Ђв”Ђ BLOCK 2: RLS POLICIES в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
-- Drop all existing policies first
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "own_candidates"         ON candidates;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "own_jobs"               ON jobs;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "own_deals"              ON deals;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "own_activity"           ON activity;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "service_activity"       ON activity;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "client_read_candidates" ON candidates;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "client_own_feedback"    ON client_feedback;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "admin_read_feedback"    ON client_feedback;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "recruiter_candidates"   ON candidates;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "recruiter_jobs"         ON jobs;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "admin_candidates"       ON candidates;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "admin_jobs"             ON jobs;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "admin_deals"            ON deals;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "recruiter_deals"        ON deals;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "admin_activity"         ON activity;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "recruiter_activity"     ON activity;
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "staff_read_feedback"    ON client_feedback;

-- Helper functions
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION current_user_role()
RETURNS text LANGUAGE sql STABLE AS $$
  SELECT coalesce(auth.jwt()->'user_metadata'->>'role','admin')
$$;
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION current_user_company()
RETURNS text LANGUAGE sql STABLE AS $$
  SELECT auth.jwt()->'user_metadata'->>'client_company'
$$;
-- workspace_owner_id scopes client to a single recruiter workspace
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION current_workspace_owner()
RETURNS uuid LANGUAGE sql STABLE AS $$
  SELECT nullif(auth.jwt()->'user_metadata'->>'workspace_owner_id','')::uuid
$$;

-- Admin policies
CREATE POLICY "admin_candidates" ON candidates FOR ALL
  USING  (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='admin')
  WITH CHECK (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='admin');
CREATE POLICY "admin_jobs" ON jobs FOR ALL
  USING  (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='admin')
  WITH CHECK (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='admin');
CREATE POLICY "admin_deals" ON deals FOR ALL
  USING  (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='admin')
  WITH CHECK (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='admin');
CREATE POLICY "admin_activity" ON activity FOR ALL
  USING  (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='admin')
  WITH CHECK (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='admin');

-- Recruiter policies
CREATE POLICY "recruiter_candidates" ON candidates FOR ALL
  USING  (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='recruiter')
  WITH CHECK (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='recruiter');
CREATE POLICY "recruiter_jobs" ON jobs FOR ALL
  USING  (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='recruiter')
  WITH CHECK (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='recruiter');
CREATE POLICY "recruiter_deals" ON deals FOR ALL
  USING  (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='recruiter')
  WITH CHECK (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='recruiter');
CREATE POLICY "recruiter_activity" ON activity FOR ALL
  USING  (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='recruiter')
  WITH CHECK (auth.uid()=user_id AND current_user_role()='recruiter');

-- Client: read-only, scoped by workspace_owner_id + company + visible flag
-- workspace_owner_id prevents cross-workspace leaks (set when creating client user)
CREATE POLICY "client_read_candidates" ON candidates FOR SELECT
  USING (
    current_user_role()='client'
    AND visible_to_client=true
    AND (current_workspace_owner() IS NULL OR user_id=current_workspace_owner())
    AND (current_user_company() IS NULL OR client_company=current_user_company())
  );

-- Client feedback
CREATE POLICY "client_own_feedback" ON client_feedback FOR ALL
  USING (auth.uid()=client_user_id) WITH CHECK (auth.uid()=client_user_id);
CREATE POLICY "staff_read_feedback" ON client_feedback FOR SELECT
  USING (current_user_role() IN ('admin','recruiter'));

-- в”Ђв”Ђ USER SETUP в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
-- Admin:     { "role": "admin" }
-- Recruiter: { "role": "recruiter" }
-- Client:    { "role": "client", "client_company": "HiARC",
--              "workspace_owner_id": "<your-admin-uuid>" }
--
-- Mark candidates visible to a client:
-- UPDATE candidates SET visible_to_client=true, client_company='HiARC'
-- WHERE id IN ('id1','id2');
--
-- Verify:
-- SELECT tablename,policyname FROM pg_policies
-- WHERE tablename IN ('candidates','jobs','deals','activity','client_feedback')
-- ORDER BY tablename;
Email Sending
Connect your Resend account to send real emails from TalentBase. Emails are sent via a secure server-side proxy вЂ” your API key never touches the browser. Without configuration, outreach is still logged and composable via Gmail.
Not configured
Enter your proxy URL below to enable real sending
Vercel Domain For tracking pixel
Your Vercel deployment URL вЂ” used for open-tracking pixel. Must match your deployed domain exactly.
Email Proxy URL
Your deployed api/send-email.js Vercel function URL. Set RESEND_API_KEY in your Vercel environment variables.
From Name
From Address (must be verified in Resend)
Add and verify this domain in Resend в†’ Domains
Email Secret Security token for send-email.js
Generate once: openssl rand -hex 32 в†’ add as EMAIL_SECRET in Vercel env vars, and paste the same value here. Prevents anyone else from using your email relay.
Approval Mode
Control whether auto-pipeline outreach sends immediately or waits for manual approval.
Require approval before sending
Auto-pipeline queues outreach вЂ” you review and approve each email before it sends
Deployment Setup
The email proxy function lives in your GitHub repo at api/send-email.js. Vercel deploys it automatically on push.
1. Push api/send-email.js to GitHub
2. In Vercel project в†’ Settings в†’ Environment Variables
3. Add: RESEND_API_KEY = your Resend API key
4. Redeploy (or it auto-deploys on next push)
5. Paste your Vercel URL above: https://yoursite.vercel.app/api/send-email
